name: Frozen Nectarine Cream
recipeInstructions:
Note: I use egg substitute because of the Salmonella problem.
1. In a large bowl, beat eggs until thick and lemon colored.
2. Beat in sugar.
3. Stir in milk, corn syrup, vanilla, and almond extract.
4. Discard nectarine pits.
5. Puree nectarines until smooth.
6. Stir into egg mixture.
7. Stir in whipping cream.
8. Pour into ice cream canister and freeze according to manufacturer's directions.
Yield: 2 quarts
